---
title: unsecure-url-scheme
description: "Detect insecure URL schemes."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect insecure URL schemes. Strider default: HTTP, WS, and FTP.

## Bad

```go
endpoint := "http://example.com"
```

## Good

```go
endpoint := "https://example.com"
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only unsecure-url-scheme`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
